prompt: Create a cinematic first-person sci-fi fantasy scene in a vast alien city-temple where the viewer’s two human hands reach forward from the bottom foreground toward a group of silent humanoid tree-like beings. Show exactly 5 visible beings: 1 enormous central figure closest to the viewer, 1 medium figure on the left, 1 medium figure right of center, 1 smaller figure farther back on the right, and 1 tiny distant figure at the far right. Each creature has no visible face, a tall cylindrical head and body made of vertical bark-like tendrils, root-like robes merging into the stone floor, long arms extended outward, and open many-fingered palms facing the viewer in a ritual greeting or telepathic contact. The setting is a misty biomechanical forest cathedral: towering ribbed organic architecture, spiral platforms, elevated bridges, needle-like spires, mushroom-canopy structures, translucent blue-gray haze, wet cracked stone ground engraved with circular patterns, tiny glowing blue particles, and a cluster of warm amber oval windows glowing on the right. Use ultra-detailed cinematic concept art, photorealistic dark fantasy sci-fi with cool desaturated teal and gray tones, intricate bark textures, atmospheric depth, soft volumetric light filtering from above, wide-angle immersive perspective, symmetrical composition centered on the largest being, eerie awe-filled mood, extremely high detail, no text, no watermark.
